name: hyperliquid-trading-tool
description: Comprehensive Hyperliquid DEX trading tools for account management, market data, order execution, and position management with testnet support

environment_variables.name: HYPERLIQUID_API_SECRET
environment_variables.description: API wallet secret key for trading operations (recommended to use dedicated API wallet)

environment_variables.name: HYPERLIQUID_USE_TESTNET
environment_variables.description: Use testnet instead of mainnet (default: true)

example_usage:
```python
from sygaldry_registry.tools.hyperliquid_trading import (
    check_account_balance,
    get_open_positions,
    get_market_data,
    place_market_order,
    place_limit_order,
    close_position,
)

# Check account balance
balance = check_account_balance(testnet=True)
print(f"Account Value: ${balance['account_value']}")

# Get market data
btc_data = get_market_data('BTC', testnet=True)
print(f"BTC Price: ${btc_data['mark_price']}")
print(f"Funding Rate: {btc_data['funding_rate']}")

# Get open positions
positions = get_open_positions(testnet=True)
for pos in positions:
    print(f"{pos['coin']}: {pos['side']} {pos['size']} @ ${pos['entry_price']}")
    print(f"  Unrealized P&L: ${pos['unrealized_pnl']}")

# Place a limit order
order_result = place_limit_order(
    coin='BTC',
    side='buy',
    size=0.01,
    price=50000.0,
    testnet=True
)

# Place a market order
market_result = place_market_order(
    coin='ETH',
    side='buy',
    size=0.1,
    testnet=True
)

# Close a position
close_result = close_position('BTC', testnet=True)
```
post_add_instructions:
You can now use the Hyperliquid trading tools. Make sure to set the required environment variables:

1. HYPERLIQUID_WALLET_ADDRESS - Your main wallet address
2. HYPERLIQUID_API_SECRET - API wallet secret (generate at https://app.hyperliquid.xyz/API)
3. HYPERLIQUID_USE_TESTNET - Set to 'true' for safe testing (default)

Available tools:
- check_account_balance() - Get account balance and margin info
- get_open_positions() - Get all open positions
- get_market_data() - Get market data for a coin
- get_funding_rate() - Get funding rate information
- get_order_book() - Get order book depth
- place_market_order() - Execute market orders
- place_limit_order() - Place limit orders
- cancel_order() - Cancel open orders
- close_position() - Close entire position

All tools support testnet mode (enabled by default) for safe testing.
